name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BH211 Latest version: New season Miu Miu iconic Matelasse quilted calfskin material, Miu's unique design, gorgeous shoulder strap highlighting unique features. The body design exudes a refined and elegant style. Metal-engraved logo on the front. Zipper closure. Satin and soft calfskin pockets. Height 16.5cm, Length 21cm, Width 5.5 cm, (comes with original packaging)
